source_text: Example widget shipped by the Hello World teaching plugin.
column7: amit a Hello World oktató plugin szállít.

source_text: Hello from the plugin raw event!
Hello from the plugin view event
This response is rendered by a plugin template.
text: Ezt a választ egy plugin template rendereli.

source_text: The event decides what data the template receives.
The template decides how that data becomes HTML.
The widget can reuse the same template as a subcomponent.
text: A widget ugyanazt a template-et alkomponensként is újra tudja használni.

source_text: This same template is reused by the widget demo as a subcomponent.
text: Ugyanezt a template-et a widget demó alkomponensként újrahasználja.
